content.speakerText: Is there a special deal on bread today?

options.text: Yes, it's 50% off if you buy two.
No, but we just restocked it yesterday.
Yes, you can exchange it for milk.
No, we don't sell bread here.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yes, it's 50% off if you buy two.' 是对促销问题的合理回应，符合‘买一送半价’的促销逻辑。干扰项2只说明补货，未回应促销；干扰项3混淆了促销与兑换；干扰项4完全错误，与场景矛盾。

content.speakerText: Do you have any coupons for cereal?

options.text: Yes, they're on the shelf next to the cereal.
No, but you can get a free sample if you ask.
Yes, you need to pay $5 to get one.
No, we don't sell cereal anymore.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yes, they're on the shelf next to the cereal.' 符合常见优惠券摆放位置（靠近商品）。干扰项2提供的是免费样品而非优惠券；干扰项3错误，优惠券通常免费；干扰项4与场景矛盾。

content.speakerText: Are there any discounts if I buy multiple items?
content.speakerTextCn: 如果我买多件商品有折扣吗？

options.text: Yes, we have a 15% off bundle deal for three or more items.
No, we only offer discounts on expired products.
Yes, but you need to be a celebrity to qualify.
No, discounts are only available online.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了合理的多件折扣信息（买三件打八五折），符合促销场景。干扰项2荒谬（过期商品不打折）；干扰项3不现实（名人特权）；干扰项4错误，线下也可有折扣。

content.template: Is there a special deal on ___ today?
content.hint: 这是询问特定商品促销的常用句型，需填入商品名称
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（商品名称）

content.template: They're at the front near the ___ — grab one!
content.hint: 优惠券通常放在收银台附近方便顾客取用

content.template: You can get 10% off if you ___ the loyalty app.
content.hint: 使用会员App享受折扣的常见动作是扫码
content.knowledgePoint: 场景惯用搭配（scan the app）

content.speakerText: Is there a special deal on bread today?
expectedAnswers: Yes, buy one, get one half off — it's on the end cap.
There's a 20% discount if you buy three loaves.
Not today, but I recommend checking the loyalty app — you might get a coupon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应是否有促销
语言准确性：语法正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：使用了场景关键词如 'buy one, get one half off', 'loyalty app', 'end cap'

content.speakerText: Do you have any coupons for cereal?
expectedAnswers: Yes, they're at the front near the checkout — feel free to take one!
Not today, but we have a buy-3-get-1-free promotion instead.
You can download them from our website — just search for 'cereal coupons'.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应优惠券是否存在或提供替代方案
语言准确性：使用正确动词如 'download', 'take', 'have'
表达自然度：使用场景关键词如 'checkout', 'buy-3-get-1-free', 'download'

content.speakerText: Do you have any ongoing promotions this week?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周有什么持续促销活动吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, we have a weekly sale on dairy products — 20% off all cheese and yogurt.
There's a flash sale on fruits and vegetables every Friday.
We don't have fixed promotions, but signing up for our app gives you exclusive weekly deals.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明是否有促销及具体内容
语言准确性：使用恰当时态（现在进行时、一般现在时）和促销术语
表达自然度：包含场景关键词如 'weekly sale', 'flash sale', 'exclusive deals', 'signing up'
